title: Creaking Chopper Enchantment
description: Enchantment that allows you to kill the creaking
body:
## Overview

Creaking Chopper is a single level enchantment that allows you to kill the creaking.

It can be put on any weapon, it can be found in the enchanting table (swords only) and it can be crafted.

## Feedback

This mod also exists on curseforge, for any problem, leave a comment on the [curseforge project](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/creakingchopperenchantment).
